prompt: Full-body portrait of a young woman strolling along a lakeside park path at golden hour, walking toward the viewer with calm confident expression, long dark hair gently blown by breeze, wearing a loose beige T-shirt tucked into high-waisted wide-leg green trousers and white sneakers, holding a small bouquet of peach and white flowers in one hand, delicate orange hoop earrings and a slim wristwatch, soft natural makeup. Background: tranquil lake reflecting the warm sunset, distant modern city skyline, lamp post with hanging swing, wooden benches, flowerbeds and scattered petals on the path, a small kiosk with a drink on the counter and stacked books on a nearby table. Mood: serene, romantic, nostalgic. Lighting: warm rim and backlight, soft volumetric glow, pastel peach and green color palette, subtle reflections on water. Style: high-detail digital painting with smooth painterly brushwork, soft bokeh and shallow depth of field, realistic fabric folds and skin texture, cinematic composition, balanced framing, gentle contrast, atmospheric haze.
